name: jarvis
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Jarvis instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Jarvis tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Jarvis through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Jarvis Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Jarvis only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
